title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 529.030 - Persons making returns shall reply
text:
529.030.  Persons making returns shall reply. — The persons making such return shall reply, take issue or direct a motion to the pleading of the party suing out or prosecuting such writ.
(RSMo 1939 § 1698, A. 1949 H.B. 2130) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1534; 1919 § 1984; 1909 § 2548
